data.name: A Sexy Quiz Show
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to "A Sexy Quiz Show", where brains, not brawn, win the ultimate prize!

Step up to the podium and prove your intellectual prowess across a variety of categories. Your knowledge is your key to victory, and your performance unlocks the rewards you really want. 🔞

Features:

  • 📺 Meet your hosts: The game features charismatic hosts, each with a unique personality and a specialized quiz category.

  • 🔞 The Better You Play, The More You See: Our hosts don't just read questions—they react to your performance! The more questions you get right, the more they'll... appreciate your talent.

  • ❤️ Earn Hearts, Unlock Rewards: Stellar performance isn't just for show. Earn "Hearts" 💖 by completing quizzes, achieving high accuracy, and finishing in record time. Spend your Hearts in the Shop to permanently unlock naughty images and videos.

  • ❓ A True Quiz Challenge: Test your knowledge with 20 questions per session, pulled from a pool of 30 to ensure replayability.

  • 💡 Lifelines When You Need Them: Use three powerful lifelines per session; the 50/50, the Skip, and the Switch.

  • 🏆 Achievements

  • 💾 Save system

Do you have what it takes to conquer A Sexy Quiz Show?

data.short_description: Welcome to A Sexy Quiz Show! Test your wits against sexy hosts! Answer trivia, earn hearts, and collect naughty image & video rewards. Are you smart enough to see it all?
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 日文, 韓文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 equivalent or greater
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel UHD 620 equivalent or greater
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 480 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 equivalent or greater
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel UHD 620 equivalent or greater
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 480 MB 可用空間
